basic_details.job_title: NIT Rourkela Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Rourkela (NIT Rourkela) Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 22 May 2026 on the official website nitrkl.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Rourkela Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable up to 5 years for candidates belonging to Schedule Castes / Schedule Tribes / PWD and Female applicants. Age relaxation is applicable up to 3 years for OBCs (Non-creamy layer candidates).

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in science / 3 years Diploma in Engineering & Technology
qualification.details: Bachelor's degree in science OR 3 years Diploma in Engineering & Technology. One Year Hands-on Experience. Minimum 50% in all examinations.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Rourkela Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Rourkela Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the NIT Rourkela Project Assistant recruitment is 21st June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree in science or a 3-year Diploma in Engineering & Technology. Additionally, one year of hands-on experience and a minimum of 50% marks in all examinations are required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Assistant post is 28 years. Age relaxation is provided for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant position at NIT Rourkela will be based on an Online Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Project Assistant position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 27,000 per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application for the Project Assistant post at NIT Rourkela must be submitted via email. Candidates need to send their resume and required documents to the official email address.

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Assistant post in this recruitment drive by NIT Rourkela.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The Project Assistant position at NIT Rourkela is a contractual job. The appointment will be on a contract basis as per the project requirements.

faq.question: Q10. Where is NIT Rourkela located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Rourkela is located in Rourkela, Odisha, with the pincode 769008.
